programme.title: Desert Bloom
programme.desc: Witness the silent resilience of the California desert. When the rare spring rains arrive, the arid sands of Anza-Borrego transform into a vibrant tapestry of life, featuring close-up cinematography of delicate desert lilies, abrasive cacti blossoms, and vast, sun-drenched horizons. Experience the fleeting, brilliant beauty of the desert as it is momentarily reclaimed by a sea of wildflowers in this immersive, high-definition escape.

programme.title: Journey Through Joshua Tree
programme.desc: Explore a wonderland of unique desert life in "Journey Through Joshua Tree." The Mojave desert of California is home to the unique Joshua Tree forests and sandstone rock formations of Joshua Tree National Park. Enjoy a calming acoustic guitar soundtrack along with the stunning beauty of this desert landscape. Runtime 75 minutes.
